category_sources: source_facts.description says faketty wraps command execution in a pty, which is terminal/developer tooling.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and source_facts.executables both identify the project as faketty.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; README is the best official documentation surface available.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says it executes commands in a pty even when redirecting output; source_facts.executables lists faketty.
